data.title: End-to-End Encryption
data.description: Ensures secure transmission of user data across the Netflix platform.
data.technical_spec: TLS/SSL encryption protocols are employed for secure data transit.

data.title: Zero Trust Security Model
data.description: Every request, whether inside or outside the network, is treated as though it originated from an open network.
data.technical_spec: Implement strict authentication and authorization protocols.

data.title: Automated Security Response
data.description: Automates the identification and response to threats.
data.technical_spec: Leverages tools for threat detection and real-time monitoring.

data.title: Periodic Security Audits
data.description: Regular security audits and penetration testing to identify vulnerabilities.
data.technical_spec: Collaborates with external security experts for comprehensive assessments.

data.title: User Data Protection
data.description: Strict policies to protect customer data and privacy.
data.technical_spec: Complies with GDPR and CCPA regulations.
